recommendations.title: Patient Seven

recommendations.director: Rasmus Wassberg, Erlingur Thoroddsen, Johannes Persson, Dean Hewison, Paul Davis, Danny Draven, Joel Morgan, Nicholas Peterson, Ómar Örn Hauksson

recommendations.title: Clinical
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist tries to put her life back together after a violent attack by seeking to repair the life of a new patient, but he has his own terrifying history.

recommendations.title: Spellbound
recommendations.overview: When Dr. Anthony Edwardes arrives at a Vermont mental hospital to replace the outgoing hospital director, Dr. Constance Peterson, a psychoanalyst, discovers Edwardes is actually an impostor. The man confesses that the real Dr. Edwardes is dead and fe

recommendations.title: Eli
recommendations.overview: A boy named Eli with a rare autoimmune disorder is confined to a special experimental clinic for his treatment. He soon begins experiencing supernatural forces, turning the supposedly safe facility into a haunted prison for him and his fellow patient

recommendations.title: Summer's Blood
recommendations.overview: A demented handyman comes to the rescue of a young woman, then imprisons her in his basement.

recommendations.title: Some Guy Who Kills People
recommendations.overview: A former mental patient's repressed anger reaches the boiling point, leading him to embark on a mission of revenge against the thugs who once subjected him to severe physical and mental trauma.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Bloodline
recommendations.overview: Three generations of the same family deal with the consequences of unleashing the forces of hell.

recommendations.title: Eyes Without a Face

recommendations.title: Boogeyman 2
recommendations.overview: A young woman attempts to cure her phobia of the boogeyman by checking herself into a mental health facility, only to realize too late that she is now helplessly trapped with her own greatest fear.
